fn init_cli() {
    let rt = tokio::runtime::Runtime::new().unwrap();
    rt.block_on(async {
        let db = connect_db().await;
        let cache = connect_cache().await;
        let config = load_config().await;
        run_server(db, cache, config).await;
    });
}

fn init_worker() {
    let rt = tokio::runtime::Runtime::new().unwrap();
    rt.block_on(async {
        let db = connect_db().await;
        let cache = connect_cache().await;
        let config = load_config().await;
        run_worker(db, cache, config).await;
    });
}

async fn connect_db() -> Db { todo!() }
async fn connect_cache() -> Cache { todo!() }
async fn load_config() -> Config { todo!() }
async fn run_server(_db: Db, _cache: Cache, _config: Config) { todo!() }
async fn run_worker(_db: Db, _cache: Cache, _config: Config) { todo!() }
struct Db;
struct Cache;
struct Config;
